![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7d/Tabliczka_AH140.svg/120px-Tabliczka_AH140.svg.png) AH140 is a highway that is part of [Asian Highway Network](/wiki/Asian_Highway_Network "Asian Highway Network"). It was never signposted in Malaysia, although it is part of Asian Highway Network. It follows [Butterworth–Kulim Expressway](/wiki/Butterworth%E2%80%93Kulim_Expressway "Butterworth–Kulim Expressway") and [Malaysia Federal Route 4](/wiki/Malaysia_Federal_Route_4 "Malaysia Federal Route 4").

**Asian Highway 140** ![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7d/Tabliczka_AH140.svg/120px-Tabliczka_AH140.svg.png) AH140 is a highway that is part of [Asian Highway Network](/wiki/Asian_Highway_Network "Asian Highway Network"). It was never signposted in Malaysia, although it is part of Asian Highway Network. It follows [Butterworth–Kulim Expressway](/wiki/Butterworth%E2%80%93Kulim_Expressway "Butterworth–Kulim Expressway") and [Malaysia Federal Route 4](/wiki/Malaysia_Federal_Route_4 "Malaysia Federal Route 4").
